name: Mocha Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the coffee and boiling water in a bowl. Stir until combined.
2. Let the mixture cool completely.
3. In another bowl, cream together the brown sugar and shortening until light and fluffy.
4. Add the eggs to the butter mixture and beat thoroughly until well combined.
5. Sift together the flour, baking soda, salt, allspice, cinnamon, cloves, and 1/4 cup of the flour reserved for dredging the fruits into a separate bowl.
6. Alternately add the dry ingredients and the cooled coffee mixture to the butter mixture, mixing until smooth.
7. Add the currents, citron slices, and remaining 1 teaspoon of cinnamon to taste, then mix well.
8. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan that has been well-oiled.
9. Bake in a slow oven (350°F) for about 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
